heading: Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
label: 83 to 85 Repealed. ,Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641
notes: Section 83, , , related to ammunition for use of Army and Navy, storage and dispersal, control by a joint board of officers. See , Armed Forces.act May 29, 1928, ch. 853, § 145 Stat. 928section 172 of Title 10
Section 84, , , related to expenditure at armories for perfection of patentable inventions.act Mar. 3, 1875, ch. 133, § 118 Stat. 455
